stack.model_family: Kronos (NeoQuasar) — VQ-VAE tokenizer + hierarchical Transformer predictor
stack.version_control: Git (agent-protected SSH ed25519 key, Conventional Commits with M-XXX scope)

gpu_routing.phase: Tokenization validation, may OOM on T4 → fallback to CPU
Batch prediction, VRAM < 0.5GB per inference call

constraints.constraint: No asset-ID embedding — per-window z-score removes price level
Tokenizer frozen during fine-tune (Phase 0 quality gate must pass first)
Strict temporal split: train < val < test, no leakage
All parameters in global.yaml — no hardcoded values in code
CLI modules must support: Resume, Retry, Idempotent, Validate

PreferredAgentStack.lint: Ruff (lint + format), MyPy (type check), import-linter (layer contracts)
PreferredAgentStack.observability: Modal logs, wandb (optional), print-based progress for CLI modules

AutonomyPolicy.retry-budget: 3 attempts per module failure, then escalate to controller
AutonomyPolicy.replan-triggers: Grace lint failure, contract mismatch, import-linter violation, quality gate failure
AutonomyPolicy.stop-conditions: 3 consecutive autonomous cycles without progress, Sharpe below -5, NaN in predictions, data source unreachable after 3 retries
AutonomyPolicy.verification-gates: ruff check, grace lint --profile autonomous, pytest, import-linter
AutonomyPolicy.phase-gates: P0 tokenizer codebook_util >= 200, P1 validation CE loss convergence, P2 Sharpe >= 0.5
